name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. Blue leather details create a chic and fashionable look.
name_cn:
!!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. Blue leather details create a chic and fashionable look.
Blue/Blue GG Supreme canvas
Blue leather details
Gold-tone hardware
Cloud print fabric and suede lining
Horsebit details
Interior: 6 card slots, 1 flat pocket, 1 gusseted zip pocket, and 1 open pocket
1 zip pocket
1 open pocket
Detachable chain strap height 58cm
Button closure
Weight: approx. 0.3kg
Model: 621892.
Open dimensions: 19cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Closed dimensions: 19cm (W) x 10cm (H) x 4cm (D)
Color: Blue/pvc.
Made in Italy
